assessor_raw: Multimodal pathology classification: well-designed experiment. Site-and-time stratified split provides rigorous generalization testing. Macro-F1 correctly weights rare subtype performance. Image-only baseline with identical architecture isolates text contribution. Label leakage audit is an important control. Fit-apply separation is explicit. Bootstrap CIs without retraining are appropriate. Per-class metrics and calibration (ECE) address clinical deployment concerns. Scope appropriately bounded. Verdict: defense_wins.
